 0362            }
 363
 0364            return isValid;
 365
 0366        }

 417        private bool ValidateAddItemSubstance()
 0418        {
 0419            bool isValid = true;
 0420            if (SubstanceNameBox.Text == string.Empty)
 0421            {
 0422                SubstanceNameBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0423                SubstanceNameBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0424                AddActiveSubstanceMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0425                isValid = false;
 0426            }
 427
 0428            if (ConcentrationBox.Text == string.Empty)
 0429            {
 0430                ConcentrationBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0431                ConcentrationBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0432                AddActiveSubstanceMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0433                isValid = false;
 0434            }
 435
 0436            if (!float.TryParse(ConcentrationBox.Text, out float concentration))
 0437            {
 0438                ConcentrationBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0439                ConcentrationBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0440                AddActiveSubstanceFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0441                isValid = false;
 0442            }
 443
 0444            if (ActiveSubstancesDict.ContainsKey(SubstanceNameBox.Text))
 0445            {
 0446                SubstanceNameBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0447                SubstanceNameBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0448                AddActiveSubstanceInvalidError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0449                isValid = false;
 0450            }
 451
 0452            if (!substancesRepository.SubstanceExists(SubstanceNameBox.Text))
 0453            {
 0454                SubstanceNameBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0455                SubstanceNameBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0456                ConcentrationBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0457                AddActiveSubstanceInvalidError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0458                isValid = false;
 0459            }
 460
 461
 0462            return isValid;
 0463        }

 465        private void RemoveSubstance_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
 0466        {
 0467            string name = SubstanceNameBox.Text;
 468
 0469            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(name))
 0470            {
 0471                SubstanceNameBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0472                RemoveUpdateActiveSubstanceError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0473                return;
 474            }
 475
 476
 0477            if (ActiveSubstancesDict.ContainsKey(name))
 0478            {
 0479                ActiveSubstancesDict.Remove(name);
 0480            }
 481            else
 0482            {
 0483                RemoveUpdateActiveSubstanceError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0484                return;
 485            }
 486
 487            // Refresh
 0488            RefreshActiveSubstancesListUpdate();
 489
 0490            SubstanceNameBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0491            ConcentrationBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0492            ResetActiveSubstanceErrors();
 0493        }

 507        private void RefreshBatchesList()
 0508        {
 0509            var list = BatchesDict
 0510                .Select(kvp => new BatchItem
 0511                {
 0512                    Date = kvp.Key,
 0513                    Packs = kvp.Value
 0514                })
 0515                .OrderBy(x => x.Date)
 0516                .ToList();
 517
 0518            BatchesList.ItemsSource = list;
 0519        }

 521        private void AddBatch_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
 0522        {
 0523            if (!ValidateAddBatch())
 0524            {
 0525                return;
 526            }
 527
 0528            int packs = int.Parse(PacksBox.Text);
 529            // Convert DatePicker.Date (DateTimeOffset) to DateOnly
 0530            DateOnly date = DateOnly.FromDateTime(BatchDatePicker.Date.Date);
 531
 0532            BatchesDict[date] = packs;
 533
 0534            RefreshBatchesList();
 535
 0536            PacksBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0537            ResetAddBatchErrors();
 0538        }
 539
 540        private bool ValidateAddBatch()
 0541        {
 0542            bool isValid = true;
 0543            if (BatchDatePicker.Date == null)
 0544            {
 545                // Handle error: date not selected
 0546                AddBatchMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0547                isValid = false;
 0548            }
 549
 0550            if (PacksBox.Text == string.Empty)
 0551            {
 0552                PacksBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0553                AddBatchMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0554                PacksBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0555                isValid = false;
 0556            }
 557
 0558            if (!int.TryParse(PacksBox.Text, out int packs))
 0559            {
 560                // Handle error: invalid number format
 0561                PacksBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0562                AddBatchFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0563                PacksBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0564                isValid = false;
 0565            }
 0566            return isValid;
 0567        }
 568
 569        public void ResetAddBatchErrors()
 0570        {
 0571            BatchDatePicker.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
 0572            PacksBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
 0573            AddBatchMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
 0574            AddBatchFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
 0575            RemoveBatchError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

 578        private void RemoveBatch_Click(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
 0579        {
 580
 0581            var selectedBatch = BatchesList.SelectedItem as BatchItem;
 582
 0583            if (selectedBatch != null)
 0584            {
 585
 0586                if (BatchesDict.ContainsKey(selectedBatch.Date))
 0587                {
 0588                    BatchesDict.Remove(selectedBatch.Date);
 589
 0590                    RefreshBatchesList();
 0591                }
 0592            }
 593            else
 0594            {
 0595                RemoveBatchError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0596            }
 0597        }

 0611            {

 0622            RemoveItemError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
 623
 0624        }

 0640            }
 0641        }

 643        private void OnGetItemDataClick(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
 0644        {
 0645            if (!ValidateGetItemData())
 0646            {
 0647                return;
 648            }
 649
 0650            Item item = itemsRepository.GetItem(int.Parse(IdBox.Text));
 0651            NameBoxUpdate.Text = item.Name;
 0652            ProducerBoxUpdate.Text = item.Producer;
 0653            PriceBoxUpdate.Text = item.Price.ToString();
 0654            CategoryBoxUpdate.Text = item.Category;
 0655            ImagePathBoxUpdate.Text = item.ImagePath;
 0656            NumberOfPillsBoxUpdate.Text = item.NumberOfPills.ToString();
 0657            LabelBoxUpdate.Text = item.Label;
 0658            DescriptionBoxUpdate.Text = item.Description;
 0659            DiscountBoxUpdate.Text = item.DiscountPercentage.ToString();
 660
 0661            ActiveSubstancesDict = item.ActiveSubstances;
 0662            RefreshActiveSubstancesListUpdate();
 0663            BatchesDict = item.Batches;
 0664            RefreshBatchesListUpdate();
 665
 0666            ResetUpdateItemErrors();
 0667            isGetItemDataClicked = true;
 668
 0669        }
 670
 671        private bool ValidateGetItemData()
 0672        {
 0673            bool isValid = true;
 674
 0675            if (IdBox.Text == string.Empty)
 0676            {
 0677                IdBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0678                IdBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0679                UpdateItemMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0680                isValid = false;
 0681            }
 0682            else if (!int.TryParse(IdBox.Text, out int id))
 0683            {
 0684                IdBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0685                IdBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0686                UpdateItemFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0687                isValid = false;
 0688            }
 689            else
 0690            {
 691                try
 0692                {
 0693                    itemsRepository.GetItem(id);
 0694                }
 0695                catch (Exception ex)
 0696                {
 697
 0698                    IdBox.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0699                    IdBox.Text = string.Empty;
 0700                    UpdateInvalidIdError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0701                    isValid = false;
 0702                }
 0703            }
 704
 0705            return isValid;
 0706        }

 708        private void OnUpdateItemClick(object sender, RoutedEventArgs e)
 0709        {
 0710            if (!ValidateUpdateItem())
 0711            {
 0712                return;
 713            }
 714
 0715            int id = int.Parse(IdBox.Text);
 716
 717            //Item itemToBeUpdated = itemsRepository.GetItem(int.Parse(IdBox.Text));
 718
 0719            string name = NameBoxUpdate.Text;
 0720            string producer = ProducerBoxUpdate.Text;
 0721            string category = CategoryBoxUpdate.Text;
 0722            string imagePath = ImagePathBoxUpdate.Text;
 0723            string label = LabelBoxUpdate.Text;
 0724            string description = DescriptionBoxUpdate.Text;
 0725            float price = float.Parse(PriceBoxUpdate.Text);
 0726            float discount = float.Parse(DiscountBoxUpdate.Text);
 0727            int numberOfPills = int.Parse(NumberOfPillsBoxUpdate.Text);
 0728            int quantity = 0;
 729
 0730            for (int i = 0; i < BatchesDict.Count; i++)
 0731            {
 0732                quantity += BatchesDict.ElementAt(i).Value;
 0733            }
 734
 0735            adminService.UpdateItem(id, new Item(name, producer, category, price, numberOfPills, ActiveSubstancesDict, B
 736            //System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("Added item");
 737
 0738            ItemList.ItemsSource = itemsRepository.GetAllItems();
 0739            clearItemUpdateBoxes();
 0740            ActiveSubstancesDict.Clear();
 0741            RefreshActiveSubstancesListUpdate();
 0742            BatchesDict.Clear();
 0743            RefreshBatchesListUpdate();
 0744            ResetUpdateItemErrors();
 0745        }

 0771            if (CategoryBoxUpdate.Text == string.Empty)

 0776                isValid = false;
 0777            }
 778
 0779            if (IdBox.Text == string.Empty)
 0780            {

 0788            {

 0790                UpdateItemMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0791            }
 792
 0793            if (!float.TryParse(PriceBoxUpdate.Text, out float price))

 795                //throw new ArgumentException("Invalid format");

 0797                PriceBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0798                PriceBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;

 0814                NumberOfPillsBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;

 0816                isValid = false;
 0817            }

 0820            {
 0821                DiscountBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 0822                DiscountBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;
 0823                UpdateItemFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;

 0826            }

 0829            {
 830                //System.Diagnostics.Debug.WriteLine("Active substances count is 0");

 0832                SubstanceNameBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;

 0834                ConcentrationBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;
 0835                UpdateItemMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 0836                isValid = false;
 0837            }
 838
 0839            return isValid;

 843        private void ResetUpdateItemErrors()
 0844        {

 0849            PriceBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);

 0851            DiscountBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);

 0853            ConcentrationBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);

 0855            UpdateItemFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;

 0863            PacksBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.White);
 0864            UpdateBatchMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
 0865            UpdateBatchFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
 0866            RemoveUpdateBatchError.Visibility = Visibility.Collapsed;
 0867        }

 1058        private bool ValidateUpdateBatch()
 01059        {
 01060            bool isValid = true;
 01061            if (BatchDatePickerUpdate.Date == null)
 01062            {
 1063                // Handle error: date not selected
 01064                UpdateBatchMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 01065                isValid = false;
 01066            }
 1067
 01068            if (PacksBoxUpdate.Text == string.Empty)
 01069            {
 01070                PacksBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 01071                UpdateBatchMandatoryError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 01072                PacksBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;
 01073                isValid = false;
 01074            }
 1075
 01076            if (!int.TryParse(PacksBoxUpdate.Text, out int packs))
 01077            {
 1078                // Handle error: invalid number format
 01079                PacksBoxUpdate.Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.LightPink);
 01080                UpdateBatchFormatError.Visibility = Visibility.Visible;
 01081                PacksBoxUpdate.Text = string.Empty;
 01082                isValid = false;
 01083            }
 01084            return isValid;
 01085        }
